ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defense, Goalie) */,
  "shoots" TEXT /* Shooting preference (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_overall_pick" INTEGER /* Overall pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university the player attended */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school the player attended */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's agent */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Current salary of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the team is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "federation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the federation the team is affiliated with */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Official colors of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle */,
  "team_facebook_page" TEXT /* Team's Facebook page URL */,
  "team_instagram_handle" TEXT /* Team's Instagram handle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the league (e.g., Junior, Senior, Professional) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "federation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the federation the league is affiliated with */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  "league_twitter_handle" TEXT /* League's Twitter handle */,
  "league_facebook_page" TEXT /* League's Facebook page URL */,
  "league_instagram_handle" TEXT /* League's Instagram handle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest educational degree held by the coach */,
  "previous_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach's previous team */,
  "current_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach's current team */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's current contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Current salary of the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the season belongs to */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023 Regular Season) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the season starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ends */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship in the season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the season record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the season record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the player was with the team */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "left_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player while with the team */,
  "position_on_team" TEXT /* Specific position the player plays on the team */,
  "captain" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is a captain */,
  "alternate_captain" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is an alternate captain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player-team relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player-team relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the game */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties taken by the player in the game */,
  "ice_time" REAL /* Ice time in minutes for the player in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player in the game */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the player in the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits made by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of shots blocked by the player in the game */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff wins by the player in the game */,
  "faceoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff losses by the player in the game */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes taken by the player in the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main referee for the game */,
  "linesman1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first linesman */,
  "linesman2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second linesman */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "shootout" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into a shootout */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the user is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is based */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-team relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the team (e.g., coach, manager) */,
  "position_on_team" TEXT /* Specific position or role of the user within the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the user within the team */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user within the team */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the team */,
  "left_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-team relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-team relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals allowed */,
  "goals_differential" INTEGER /* Difference between goals for and goals against */,
  "power_play_goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals scored by the team */,
  "power_play_goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals allowed by the team */,
  "penalty_killed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties killed by the team */,
  "penalty_kill_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of penalties successfully killed by the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standing record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., player, team, game) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
